title: Smoky Norwegian Bean Skillet
description: A hearty, one-pan meal featuring smoky Norwegian salmon and beans, served with a side of crunchy sprouts.
instructions: Heat the skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced red bell pepper and cook for 5 minutes.
Add the sliced red onion and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the soaked and drained navy beans, smoked paprika, and salt and pepper to taste.
Add the Norwegian salmon fillet and cook for 3-4 minutes per side.
Serve the skillet hot, garnished with crunchy sprouts.
Optional: serve with a side of crusty bread or over rice.
